headline: States make last-ditch effort to stop the Paramount ‘media behemoth’
summary: A dozen state attorneys general are suing to block the $110 billion Paramount-Warner Bros Discovery merger. They warn the merger would raise movie prices and harm cable TV distributors. States including California and New York filed the lawsuit on Monday.

headline: The EV market is on the road to recovery thanks to high gas prices
summary: Soaring gas prices have driven American car buyers towards electric vehicles, especially hybrids. EV sales rebounded significantly in Q2 2026 after a sluggish period. Automakers are posting some of their best numbers since federal tax credits ended.

headline: The 6 wildest claims in Apple’s lawsuit against OpenAI
summary: Apple has filed a lawsuit accusing OpenAI of stealing confidential documents and spying on hardware prototypes. OpenAI's hardware head allegedly asked job candidates to bring unreleased product samples to interviews. Apple claims OpenAI tricked an employee into revealing sensitive information.

headline: Even Nvidia’s head of automotive fights with Nvidia for compute
summary: Nvidia's head of automotive, Xinzhou Wu, faces internal competition for the company's powerful GPUs. The AI boom has made Nvidia's GPUs one of the most in-demand computing resources. This highlights the intense internal struggle for essential hardware components.

headline: Today’s Top Deals: 27" Samsung OLED Gaming Monitor, MTG x Marvel, and Logitech G29 Racing Wheel
summary: Discover today's top gaming deals, including a 27" Samsung OLED Gaming Monitor. Grab the Logitech G29 Racing Wheel at a discount. Also find sales on MTG x Marvel products and a Razer gaming chair.

headline: Summer Games Done Quick Cancels Sponsored SNK Stream Due to "Human Rights Concerns"
summary: Summer Games Done Quick (SGDQ) canceled a sponsored stream with SNK, citing ethical concerns. The cancellation relates to SNK's majority ownership by Saudi Arabia's crown prince. SGDQ highlighted human rights concerns as the reason for its decision.

headline: Nightmare on Elm Street Reboot in the Works at Paramount
summary: A new 'Nightmare on Elm Street' film is currently in development. Paramount Pictures is reportedly behind the upcoming reboot. This project signals a fresh start for the iconic horror franchise.

headline: The Samsung Odyssey OLED G5 27" QHD 180Hz OLED Gaming Monitor Drops to $299.99 on Amazon
summary: The Samsung Odyssey OLED G5 27" QHD 180Hz OLED Gaming Monitor is now available for an unprecedented $299.99 on Amazon. This makes it one of the most affordable OLED gaming monitors ever released. Don't miss this incredible deal for high-performance gaming.

headline: Ann Widdecombe suspect not known to Prevent as counter terrorism police take over investigation
summary: The suspect linked to the Ann Widdecombe incident was not previously on the radar of the Prevent anti-terrorism program. Counter-terrorism police have now officially taken charge of the investigation. Home Secretary Shabana Mahmood provided this update to MPs.

headline: Twelve arrested over alleged right-wing terror threat to UK Islamic event, police say
summary: Twelve individuals have been arrested in connection with an alleged right-wing terror plot. The threat targeted a specific Islamic event within the UK. Home Secretary Shabana Mahmood praised police, stating their actions "undoubtedly saved lives."

headline: Briton tells of surviving Spain wildfire in car as wife and friends died trying to run to safety
summary: A Briton, Malcolm Timbrell, recounts surviving a devastating Spanish wildfire by remaining in his car. His wife and friends tragically died trying to flee the blaze on foot. The wildfire tore through their village, causing widespread destruction.

headline: Burnham cements Labour leadership with backing of 349 MPs
summary: Burnham has solidified his Labour leadership bid, securing the crucial backing of 349 MPs. The MP for Makerfield is now on a clear path to become the next prime minister. This overwhelming support sets him up for power next week.
